params.name: Double Ninth Kite
params.description: The paper kite, a feature of the Double Ninth Festival, is filled with festive atmosphere in its vibrant colors and gorgeous design. It is said that flying it during the festival can ward off bad luck and make the upcoming autumn days even better!
